message: The finest weapons of the Elf are forged here.
Our armor protects the warriors of the Elf.
Travelers are always welcome among the Elf. I also collect many curios and cultural items from our people.
The Goblin grandmaster stole our sacred sigil. Bring it back and you shall earn our favor.
